messages.title: AI Initiative Announcement
messages.preview_text:
To: All Staff
Subject: Exciting News — Our AI Transformation Journey

Dear team, I'm writing to share that Nexus Dynamics is embarking on a new AI initiative...
messages.flavor_sent_prepared: Message sent. Morgan nods approvingly — managers were briefed first this time.
messages.flavor_sent_unprepared: Message sent. Your inbox immediately fills with panicked replies. Morgan is going to be upset.

messages.title: Roles Not Being Eliminated
messages.preview_text:
To: All Staff
Subject: AI and Your Role at Nexus Dynamics

I want to address concerns directly: no roles are being eliminated as part of this initiative...
messages.flavor_sent_prepared: The message lands with exactly the right tone. People actually believe it this time.
messages.flavor_sent_unprepared: People read 'roles not being eliminated' and hear 'roles being eliminated.' Classic.

messages.title: Training Opportunities Available
messages.preview_text:
To: All Staff
Subject: New AI Skills Training — Sign Up Now

We're excited to announce a series of hands-on AI training workshops...
messages.flavor_sent_prepared: Casey's inbox explodes with sign-ups. She texts you a row of party emojis.
messages.flavor_sent_unprepared: A few polite RSVPs trickle in. Most people assume it's optional and ignore it.

messages.title: Progress Update to Stakeholders
messages.preview_text:
To: Executive Team, Department Heads
Subject: AI Initiative — Progress Report

I'm pleased to share our progress to date on the AI transformation initiative...
messages.flavor_sent_prepared: Harry forwards it to the board with a note: 'Finally, a project lead who communicates.'
messages.flavor_sent_unprepared: The update disappears into executive inboxes. No response. The silence is deafening.

messages.title: Call for Early Adopters
messages.preview_text:
To: All Staff
Subject: Be Part of the Future — Join Our AI Pilot Program

We're looking for enthusiastic team members to be among the first to use our new AI tools...
messages.flavor_sent_prepared: The volunteer list fills up in two days. Nova starts planning onboarding sprints.
messages.flavor_sent_unprepared: A handful of curious souls sign up. The rest wonder what 'pilot program' means for their jobs.
